attributes.action: reduce car insurance costs for all drivers across UK roads.
attributes.additional_details: Car insurance premiums are drastically increasing especially for young drivers. This makes it hard for drivers to commute to work or places of education, this also puts a lot of pressure to people who rely on their car every day. lowering the insurance prices will make travel more fairer.
attributes.background: I want the Government to take action because car insurance premiums are rising sharply, especially for young drivers. It’s becoming harder for people to afford the travel they need for work, education, and daily life. Reducing these costs would make driving more accessible and fair for everyone.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Government to review car insurance pricing and impose cap on increases
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750835
